entries.main_competence: 1.0  Demonstrate mastery of the structure of the Earth
entries.specific_competence: 1.1  Demonstrate an understanding of the origin and the structure of the Earth and earth systems
entries.learning_activity: (a)  Describe the internal structure of the Earth (crust, mantle, core) and their major characteristics (location, size/ thickness, density and gross composition)
teaching_learning_activities: Brainstorming: Guide students to brainstorm on the internal structure of the Earth
Group work: Assign students to design models and drawings to characterise the internal structure of the Earth
entries.assessment: The internal structure of the Earth is correctly described
resources: and flash with content on internal structure of the earth
entries.references: Geography Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 1.0  Demonstrate mastery of the structure of the Earth
entries.specific_competence: 1.1  Demonstrate an understanding of the origin and the structure of the Earth and earth systems
entries.learning_activity: (b)   Describe the main external Earth systems (Hydrosphere, Atmosphere and Biosphere)
teaching_learning_activities: Questions &Answers: Guide students to explain the main external earth systems
Field observation: Guide students to observe and discuss the hydrosphere, atmosphere and biosphere with cases from their communities
Independent library study: Organise students to to examine the main external earth systems
entries.assessment: The external structure of the Earth is correctly described
resources: flash with content on external structure of the earth (atmosphere, hydrosphere, biosphere and cryosphere)
entries.references: Geography Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 2.0   Demonstrate mastery of basic skills and techniques in Geography
entries.specific_competence: 2.1  Demonstrate an understanding of the basic techniques of map and photograph interpretation
entries.learning_activity: (a)  Describe the basic principles of reading and interpreting maps (key, symbols, direction, margin/frame, map title, scale and contour patterns) (b) Reading and interpreting various type of maps and their importance (topographical and statistical map)
teaching_learning_activities: Brainstorming: Guide students to brainstorm the basic principles of reading and interpreting maps
Group Discussion: Guide students to discuss basic principles of reading and interpreting maps
Case Study: Guide students to interpret and analyse various types of maps and their importance to the community
entries.assessment: The basic principles of reading and interpretation of maps are clearly explained
entries.references: Geography Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.assessment: The basic principles of reading and interpretation of maps are clearly explained
entries.references: Geography Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 2.0   Demonstrate mastery of basic skills and techniques in Geography
entries.specific_competence: 2.1  Demonstrate an understanding of the basic techniques of map and photograph interpretation
entries.learning_activity: (b) Describe the basic concept of photograph in Geography (meaning, types, elements and uses)
teaching_learning_activities: Brainstorming: Guide students to brainstorm the meaning, types, elements and importance of photographs in Geography
Group Discussion: Guide students to discuss the basic uses of photographs in Geography
Guest Speaker: Invite resourceful persons (e.g., cartographer, photographer, camera man/woman) to share their experiences on uses of photographs
entries.assessment: The concept of photograph and its contents are clearly explained
resources: Relevant books and photographs (ground, vertical and oblique)
entries.references: Geography Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 2.0   Demonstrate mastery of basic skills and techniques in Geography
entries.specific_competence: 2.1  Demonstrate an understanding of the basic techniques of map and photograph interpretation
entries.learning_activity: (c)  Describe the basic principles of photograph interpretation (identifying foreground, middle ground and background, associating objects with geographical phenomena)
teaching_learning_activities: Question & Answers: Guide students to discuss basic principles of photograph interpretation
Group Discussion: Guide students to identify different parts of photographs, interpret them and make association with geographical phenomena
Case Study: Guide students to use photographs to interpret different cases of geographical phenomena
entries.assessment: The basic principles of interpretation of photography are clearly described
entries.references: Geography Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)
